# GitHub Workflows Overview

This document provides an overview of all GitHub Actions workflows in this repository.

## Workflows

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ

в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ  Push to main   в”Ӯ  Pull Request   в”Ӯ   Weekly (Mon)  в”Ӯ   Tag (v*)    в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ

```

## Workflow Details

### 1. CI (`ci.yml`)
**Triggers:** Push to main/master, Pull Request

**Features:**
- Path filtering (only run when relevant files change)
- Matrix testing (Node 20 & 22)
- Parallel client/server jobs
- npm caching for faster builds
- Code coverage upload to Codecov
- Lint checking
- Property-based tests for server

**Status:** вң… Required check for PRs

---

### 2. Documentation (`docs.yml`)
**Triggers:** Push to main/master (docs/** paths), Manual trigger

**Features:**
- VitePress documentation build
- Automatic deployment to GitHub Pages
- Path-based triggers (only when docs change)

**Status:** вң… Deploys to GitHub Pages

---

### 3. CodeQL Analysis (`codeql.yml`)
**Triggers:** Push to main/master, Pull Request, Weekly (Monday 9 AM UTC)

**Features:**
- Security scanning with extended queries
- Code quality checks
- Scheduled weekly runs

**Status:** рҹ”’ Security requirement

---

### 4. Dependency Review (`dependency-review.yml`)
**Triggers:** Pull Request

**Features:**
- Checks for vulnerable dependencies
- PR comment with summary
- Fails on moderate+ severity

**Status:** рҹ”’ Security requirement

---

### 5. Release (`release.yml`)
**Triggers:** Tag push (v*), Manual trigger

**Features:**
- Version validation
- Automatic changelog generation
- Categorized release notes
- Support for pre-releases (alpha, beta, rc)

**Status:** рҹ“Ұ Release automation

## Required Secrets

| Secret | Workflow | Purpose |
|--------|----------|---------|
| `GITHUB_TOKEN` | All | Auto-generated, for GitHub API |
| `CODECOV_TOKEN` | CI | Optional, for code coverage uploads |

## Local Testing

Before pushing, you can test workflows locally using [act](https://github.com/nektos/act):

```bash
# Test CI workflow
act push -W .github/workflows/ci.yml

# Test release workflow (dry run)
act workflow_dispatch -W .github/workflows/release.yml -e <(echo '{"inputs": {"version": "v2.3.0"}}')
```

## Workflow Optimization Tips

1. **Use path filters** to avoid unnecessary runs
2. **Matrix strategy** for testing multiple environments
3. **Caching** npm and build artifacts
4. **Concurrency groups** to cancel outdated runs
5. **Conditional jobs** based on file changes
